title: Object Model (OM) Layer
description: Entity definitions, property types, query model, entity-storage adapters, and mapping utilities for the Puter backend OM layer.

classes.name: Entity
methods: async set(key: string, value: any): void
classes.notes: get() supports factory fallback and imply chain. private_meta.mysql_id stores DB row id.

classes.name: Mapping
classes.notes: Wraps raw mapping definitions from mappings/. Registered in RegistryService under 'om' collection. get_client_safe filters protected props and sanitizes Entity/FSNodeContext values.

classes.name: Property
classes.notes: Delegates all type behaviour to PropType. descriptor may carry: type, required, unique, immutable, protected, read_only, sql, factory, validate, adapt, imply, permissible_subproperties.

classes.name: PropType
attributes: chains: {adapt?, validate?, factory?, is_set?, sql_reference?, sql_dereference?}
classes.notes: Chain-based type system. Subtypes merge parent chains via 'from' key. adapt/factory chains are reversed (most-derived first). Registered in registry under 'om:proptype'.

classes.name: PropTypeRegistry (builtins)
classes.notes: Built-in type descriptors (plain objects, not classes): base, json (from base), string, array (from base), flag, uuid (from string), puter-uuid (from string), image-base64 (from string), url (from string), reference (from base), datetime (from base), puter-node. Each becomes a PropType instance via PropType.create().

classes.name: BaseES
classes.notes: Decorator/chain pattern. Each subclass extends METHODS static. public_wrappers (upsert, read, delete, select, read_transform, retry_predicate_rewrite) are enforced by BaseES; subclasses override via METHODS only.

classes.name: SQLES
classes.notes: om_to_sql_condition_ translates Predicate tree to SQL. Uses prop.sql_reference for value coercion. Supports: And, Or, Eq, Like, StartsWith, IsNotNull, Null.

classes.name: ValidationES
classes.notes: Strips protected/read_only props before upsert. Validates required, immutable, and type constraints. Calls prop.validate(). Respects SKIP_ES_VALIDATION context flag.

classes.name: AppES
methods: private: maybe_insert_subdomain_, ensurePuterSiteSubdomainIsOwned, ensureIndexUrlUnique, maybe_join_owned_hosted_index_url_app_on_create_, write/read_canonical_app_uid_alias_, apply_joined_requested_name_, is_origin_bootstrap_app_entity_
classes.notes: Handles: app name deduplication, icon migration events, filetype_association table, subdomain creation, UID alias (Redis KV), index_url uniqueness enforcement, private launch access, owner-only field exposure.

classes.name: NotificationES
classes.notes: Provides notification-specific predicates. Parses JSON value field on read.

classes.name: SubdomainES
classes.notes: Enforces per-user subdomain limit on create. Filters select by owner unless actor has 'read-all-subdomains' permission.

classes.name: ReadOnlyES
classes.notes: Enforces read-only constraint.

classes.name: MaxLimitES
classes.notes: Caps limit to this.max before delegating upstream.

classes.name: OwnerLimitedES
classes.notes: Restricts read/select to entities owned by the current UserActor. Returns [] / null for non-UserActorType.

classes.name: AppLimitedES
classes.notes: Scopes reads/writes to app-owned entities for AppUnderUserActorType actors. Supports permission bypass and exception predicate.

classes.name: SetOwnerES
classes.notes: Sets owner=Context.user on create. Sets app_owner=Context.app for AppUnderUserActorType. Sanitizes owner to user object on read/select.

classes.name: WriteByOwnerOnlyES
classes.notes: Blocks upsert/delete if current user is not the entity owner. Bypassed by 'system:es:write-all-owners' permission.

classes.name: ProtectedAppES
classes.notes: Filters out apps with protected=true unless: actor is the app itself, actor owns it, or actor has app:uid#<uid>:access permission.

classes.name: ESBuilder
classes.notes: Builds a chain of BaseES instances. Each constructor in list is instantiated with args from adjacent plain-object items. Each node gets upstream=previous head. Returns the outermost (head) ES.

classes.name: Predicate
classes.notes: Abstract base for all query predicates.

classes.name: Null
classes.notes: Empty/no-op predicate. Used as placeholder.

classes.name: And
classes.notes: Logical AND. Does not implement in-memory check (only SQL side).

classes.name: Like
classes.notes: Converts SQL LIKE pattern (%,_) to RegExp for in-memory checks.

classes.name: PredicateUtil
classes.notes: simplify flattens nested And/Or, removes Null branches.

key_relationships: Entity uses Mapping (this.om) — composition: Mapping injected via WeakConstructorFeature
Mapping composes Property (1 per schema field)
Property depends_on PropType (typ) — delegates adapt/validate/factory/is_set
PropType inherits_from PropType via 'from' key (chain merge)
BaseES chain: each ES holds upstream: BaseES (decorator/chain pattern)
ESBuilder creates BaseES chain from constructor list
SQLES extends BaseES — terminal SQL storage; uses Entity.create(), Predicate hierarchy
SQLES translates Predicate tree → RawCondition SQL via om_to_sql_condition_
ValidationES extends BaseES — validates before upstream.upsert()
AppES extends BaseES — app business logic layer (name dedup, icon migration, UID aliases)
NotificationES extends BaseES — notification predicates + JSON decode
SubdomainES extends BaseES — subdomain quota enforcement
ReadOnlyES extends BaseES — blocks all writes
MaxLimitES extends BaseES — caps select limit
OwnerLimitedES extends BaseES — owner-scoped reads
AppLimitedES extends BaseES — app-actor-scoped reads/writes
SetOwnerES extends BaseES — auto-assigns owner/app_owner on create
WriteByOwnerOnlyES extends BaseES — owner-only writes
ProtectedAppES extends BaseES — filters protected apps by permission
Predicate hierarchy: Null, And, Or, Eq, StartsWith, IsNotNull, Like all extend Predicate
Entity.check(condition) delegates to condition.check(entity) — Entity uses Predicate
Mapping.get_client_safe() recursively calls Entity.get_client_safe() for nested entities

built_in_mappings.app: table: apps, pk: uid (puter-uuid), props: uid, icon, name, title, description, metadata, maximize_on_start, background, subdomain, ...

design_patterns: Decorator/Chain (EntityStorage pipeline): BaseES → SetOwnerES → ValidationES → AppES → MaxLimitES → SQLES
Builder (ESBuilder.create(list)): constructs ES pipeline from array of constructors + config objects
Template Method (BaseES.METHODS static + call_on_impl_): subclasses override behavior in METHODS, BaseES enforces public interface wrappers
Chain of Responsibility (PropType.chains): type behavior composed from inherited type chain
Composite (Predicate): And/Or hold children Predicates; SQLES recursively translates to SQL
important_notes: WeakConstructorFeature allows constructor arg injection by key — avoids boilerplate constructors
Entity.get() supports: value from values_, factory fallback, imply derivation from other fields
SQLES.sql_row_to_entity_ runs property sql_dereference in parallel using ParallelTasks
AppES handles Redis KV uid-alias for app merges (TTL 90 days)
ProtectedAppES uses permission scan 'app:uid#<uid>:access' to grant access to protected apps
SKIP_ES_VALIDATION context key bypasses ValidationES checks
